name: hkx-build-fix
description: Build/type failure recovery: minimal fix via build-error-resolver, then review residual risk.

chain.label: Unblock build
chain.task:
Fix build/type errors for:

{task}

Rules:
- Sole writer for the active worktree.
- Minimal diffs only; no architecture changes.
- Re-run the failing build/typecheck and report remaining errors.
- Prefer local evidence over broad rewrites.

Return root causes, changed files, commands run, and remaining failures.

parallel.label: Minimal-fix review
parallel.task:
Review the build fix for overreach and latent breakage.

Request:
{task}

Fix summary:
{outputs.fix}

Inspect the actual diff. Do not modify project/source files; returning findings via the configured output artifact is allowed.

Configured output path is under `.pi-subagents/` (gitignored). Writes to that path are pre-authorized by GateGuard and do not require supervisor approval; do not escalate via contact_supervisor/intercom solely to write the review artifact. If a write is blocked, retry once; parent auto-reply may approve artifact-only writes. Do not modify project/source files.

parallel.label: TS safety
parallel.task:
If the change touches TypeScript/JavaScript, review type-safety and async correctness of the build fix.

Request:
{task}

Fix summary:
{outputs.fix}

If no TS/JS was changed, say so and exit early. Do not modify project/source files; returning findings via the configured output artifact is allowed.

Configured output path is under `.pi-subagents/` (gitignored). Writes to that path are pre-authorized by GateGuard and do not require supervisor approval; do not escalate via contact_supervisor/intercom solely to write the review artifact. If a write is blocked, retry once; parent auto-reply may approve artifact-only writes. Do not modify project/source files.
